decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id is corridor_webster-ave-bronx. The registry card for corridor_webster-ave-bronx already lists this observation's source_id (2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb1) and matches on all identity fields: corridor name 'Webster Avenue Corridor', street 'Webster Avenue', borough 'Bronx', limits 'from The Hub to Williamsbridge', and description referencing the Bx41 route. No different existing record is a closer match; the observation already correctly resolves to its own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Webster Avenue corridor - Based on the existing Bx41 route that carries over 20,000 daily riders - 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
